verse_text: Brood of vipers! How can you, being evil, speak good things? For out of the abundance of the heart the mouth speaks.

links.context: In the heat of passion, this man reviled and denounced the Lord. "Out of the abundance of the heart the mouth speaks" ([[MAT.12:34]]). He reviled the Lord God of Israel and died as the penalty. We must take this situation carefully and seriously to heart. The Lord God of Israel, the Lord Jesus Christ, has a name above every name ([[PHP.2:9]], [[PHP.2:10]]). Reviling Him will lead one to much more than physical death. It will lead him to eternal death. Nevertheless, our age is witnessing more and more of this reviling of Jesus as Lord.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: The Lord Jesus Christ elaborated on this thought ([[MAT.12:31]]-37).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
